title: postportalregisternewdonor
description: Test registering a new donor with valid email, password, and name to receive 201 status and donor id.

title: postportalloginvaliddonorcredentials
description: Test donor login with valid credentials to receive 200 status and JWT token.

title: postportalregisterduplicateemail
description: Test registering a donor with an already registered email to receive 400 status with 'email already exists' error.

title: postportallogininvalidcredentials
description: Test donor login with invalid credentials to receive 401 Unauthorized status.

title: postportaldashboardbookappointment
description: Test booking a new appointment with valid token and appointment details to receive 201 status with appointment confirmation and id.

title: postportaldashboardconflictingappointmenttime
description: Test booking an appointment with a time slot that conflicts with existing booking to receive 409 Conflict with 'time slot unavailable' error.

title: postportalquestionnairesubmitwithsignature
description: Test submitting medical questionnaire with valid token, questions, and signature to receive 201 status with stored questionnaire id and timestamp.

title: postportalquestionnairemissingsignature
description: Test submitting medical questionnaire with valid token but missing signature field to receive 400 Bad Request with 'missing signature' error.

title: postportalmedicationsubmitvalid
description: Test submitting categorized medication records with valid token and correct payload to receive 201 status with saved medication record id.

title: getapidonationsfetchworkflowadmin
description: Test fetching full donation workflow details with valid admin token to receive 200 status with complete workflow data.
